name: Yellow Cake
recipeIngredient: Liquid sweetener equivalent to 1/4 cup sugar
1/2 cup liquid egg substitute (at room temperature)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the dry ingredients in a mixer bowl and mix at low speed until well blended.
2. In a separate bowl, combine water, oil, sweetener, vanilla, and egg substitute; mix with a fork until blended.
3. Add the margarine to the flour mixture along with the liquid mixture; mix with a spoon only until well combined.
4. Spread the batter evenly in a 9-inch square pan that has been greased with margarine.
5. Bake for 30-35 minutes at 375°F (190°C), or until a cake tester inserted into the center comes out clean and the cake pulls away from the sides of the pan.
6. Cool to room temperature, then cut into 4 x 4 inch pieces to yield 16 equal servings.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 143; CHO: 17g; PRO: 2g; FAT: 7g; LOW-SODIUM DIETS: Use low-sodium baking powder and salt-free margarine.
